creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text: Thanks for reporting. Looks like I've misread the code and introduced an unintentional change. MDB_FDATASYNC is still not quite correct (the existing conditional in files/patch-mdb.c is ignored due to defined(BSD) above it) but that's a minor issue: fdatasync(2) is only implemented for UFS/MSDOSFS, elsewhere it's alias for fsync(2).
